## Default Permission

Default permissions for the UniRhy playback plugin

#### This default permission set includes the following:

- `allow-configure`
- `allow-update-auth`
- `allow-connect-sync`
- `allow-disconnect-sync`
- `allow-get-playback-state`
- `allow-set-volume`
- `allow-request-play`
- `allow-request-pause`
- `allow-request-seek`
- `allow-request-sync-recovery`
- `allow-local-set-queue`
- `allow-local-play`
- `allow-local-pause`
- `allow-local-seek`

## Permission Table

<table>
<tr>
<th>Identifier</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>


<tr>
<td>

`unirhy-playback:allow-configure`

</td>
<td>

Enables the configure command without any pre-configured scope.

</td>
</tr>

<tr>
<td>

`unirhy-playback:deny-configure`

</td>
<td>

Denies the configure command without any pre-configured scope.

</td>
</tr>
